title: Average Wemmbu Fan Pack
description: A texture pack that changes a bunch of textures/text files to Wemmbu.
body:
# Average Wemmbu Fan Pack
This project is similar to my Totem of Wemmbu pack, except it has a lot more items that have been changed in some way. ### List of Items that have been changed: - Firework - Wind Charge - Elytra (Item) - Broken Elytra - Elytra (Model) - Mace - Totem - Splash Text
Let's get Wemmbu to do a review of the Pack! :D If you don't want all of this, maybe get my other pack instead! [Totem of Wemmbu](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-wemmbu)
